title: Rewrite docs/roadmap.md with v1.0/v1.1/v1.2 three-phase structure and release signals
description: 重写 roadmap.md 为三段结构 (v1.0 Control Plane MVP / v1.1 Observable Maintenance / v1.2 Portability & Trust), 将 Dashboard 显式纳入 v1.1 Feature #5 位置, 每段添加可测量 release_signal. Dashboard 已完整实现但未写入 roadmap, 首次 npm publish 前必须保证文档一致性.

files.change: 重写全文为 v1.0/v1.1/v1.2 三段结构; v1.0 theme = Control Plane MVP; v1.1 segment adds Dashboard as Feature #5 at position 1; v1.2 segment adds CHANGELOG/RELEASING/scope governance; each segment has quantified release_signal

implementation: Read current docs/roadmap.md to understand existing structure and content

Draft v1.0 section: theme 'Control Plane MVP', list existing shipped features (fab init, fab serve, MCP, CLI scan), release_signal = 'npm publish @fabric/cli@1.0.0 succeeds; fab init → fab serve smoke test passes'

Draft v1.1 section: theme 'Observable Maintenance', Feature #5 Dashboard at position 1 ('Web UI for ledger/rules inspection'), remaining 4+ features after; release_signal = 'Dashboard accessible at localhost:3333 after fab serve'
Draft v1.2 section: theme 'Portability & Trust', include CHANGELOG governance, RELEASING doc, scope isolation, multi-provider trust; release_signal = 'CHANGELOG entry auto-generated on tag push'
Write updated roadmap.md — enforce locked decision: 'Dashboard 归 v1.1 Feature #5'

reference.pattern: Keep-a-Changelog format for release_signal; three-phase SemVer roadmap
reference.examples: release_signal format: '<measurable action> succeeds / <observable output> appears'

criteria: v1.0 theme = 'Control Plane MVP' appears verbatim in roadmap.md
v1.1 theme = 'Observable Maintenance' appears verbatim in roadmap.md
v1.2 theme = 'Portability & Trust' appears verbatim in roadmap.md
Feature #5 Dashboard is listed first in v1.1 section
Each of the 3 version sections contains a release_signal field with measurable criterion
convergence.definition_of_done: roadmap.md 三段结构完整, Dashboard 在 v1.1 正确归位, 每段有可测量发布信号

rationale.chosen_approach: 完整重写而非追加 — 现有结构无法直接插入三段 SemVer 框架
alternatives_considered: 在现有文档末尾追加 v1.1/v1.2 段
保持当前版本直到 v1.0 发布后再更新
decision_factors: npm publish 前文档一致性
locked decision: Dashboard 归 v1.1 Feature #5
rationale.tradeoffs: 重写需要保留现有已实现功能的描述, 避免信息丢失

manual_checks: grep 'Control Plane MVP' docs/roadmap.md returns match
grep 'Dashboard' docs/roadmap.md shows in v1.1 section
success_metrics: roadmap.md has exactly 3 version sections (v1.0, v1.1, v1.2)
Dashboard Feature #5 appears under v1.1 header

commit.message_template: docs(roadmap): three-phase v1.0/v1.1/v1.2 structure with release signals
